title: Hadoop MapReduce Library
description:
The 'lib' directory contains Java classes crucial for the MapReduce library. These include FieldSelectionHelper for field-specific data processing, KeyValueLineRecordReader and KeyValueTextInputFormat for key-value text file handling, RegexMapper for regex-based text extraction, and custom partitioners like BinaryPartitioner and KeyFieldBasedPartitioner. These elements collaborate using patterns like Strategy, Factory, and Mapper, ensuring efficient and flexible data processing in MapReduce jobs.

TITLE: JobTracker and TaskTracker Configuration

DESCRIPTION: The 'server' directory holds configuration settings for JobTracker and TaskTracker. 'server/jobtracker' contains JTConfig.java, defining JobTracker parameters like IPC address and memory limits. 'server/tasktracker' has TTConfig.java, providing TaskTracker settings such as TT_INDEX_CACHE and TT_MAP_SLOTS. Both directories follow a simple configuration interface pattern, ensuring consistent and manageable system-wide settings for their respective components in Hadoop MapReduce.

TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Configuration Utilities

DESCRIPTION: The 'util' directory houses utility classes for managing configurations and job settings. ConfigUtil.java loads deprecated configuration keys and default resources into the Configuration object. MRJobConfUtil.java offers utility methods for configuring MapReduce jobs, including redacting sensitive properties and setting logging thresholds. ProcessTree.java manages and terminates process trees and groups, ensuring graceful MapReduce task shutdown. These utilities streamline job configuration and management, adhering to Mediator and Strategy patterns.
